config_file_result_t(3) Library Functions Manual config_file_result_t(3)

NAME

config_file_result_t - Result of a config file search.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/filesystem.h>

Data Fields


char * path
Absolute path to config file (allocated, must be freed). uint8_t priority
Priority order (0 = highest, 255 = lowest). bool exists
True if file exists and is a regular file. bool is_system_config
True if from system directory (not user config).

Detailed Description

Result of a config file search.

Represents a single matching config file in the search result list.

Definition at line 555 of file filesystem.h.

Field Documentation

bool config_file_result_t::exists

True if file exists and is a regular file.

Definition at line 558 of file filesystem.h.

bool config_file_result_t::is_system_config

True if from system directory (not user config).

Definition at line 559 of file filesystem.h.

Referenced by config_load_system_and_user().

char* config_file_result_t::path

Absolute path to config file (allocated, must be freed).

Definition at line 556 of file filesystem.h.

Referenced by check_known_host(), and config_load_system_and_user().

uint8_t config_file_result_t::priority

Priority order (0 = highest, 255 = lowest).

Definition at line 557 of file filesystem.h.
